name: Zinus Green Tea Memory Foam Mattress
introText: The Zinus Green Tea Memory Foam Mattress offers Amazon's bestselling mattress in a bed-in-a-box format for $299 CAD (Queen) — the most affordable memory foam mattress available with reliable quality.
whatWorks: $299 for a Queen memory foam mattress is extraordinary value — offers genuine memory foam pressure relief at a price point where most alternatives are low-quality polyester.
Green tea infusion reduces odor during off-gassing — new foam mattresses have a chemical smell for 24–72 hours; the green tea extract reduces this noticeably.
worthKnowing: No sleep trial — returns go through Amazon's standard 30-day policy, which requires boxing up and shipping back a mattress. Much harder to use than a dedicated sleep trial.
Not comparable to premium foam — at $299, the Zinus foam compresses faster over time than the Endy ($875) or Tempur-Pedic ($3,499) materials. Lifespan is shorter.

commonComplaints.title: Compresses and softens faster than premium alternatives
commonComplaints.body: Users report the Zinus develops a body impression after 2–3 years. Budget foam doesn't last as long as premium materials like TEMPUR.

commonComplaints.title: Edge support is minimal
commonComplaints.body: The foam perimeter has no reinforcement — sitting on the edge or sleeping near it causes significant compression.

commonComplaints.title: Off-gassing smell on delivery
commonComplaints.body: Despite the green tea infusion, some units have a strong foam smell on first opening. Allow 24–48 hours to air out.

verdict: The Zinus Green Tea is the best mattress under $400 — it delivers genuine memory foam comfort at a price that most Canadians can afford without financing. Don't expect the longevity or quality of premium brands, but for a guest room, first apartment, or tight budget, it's the clear choice.

realBuyers.quote: Guest room mattress. Guests always comment on how comfortable it is. For $299 it's incredible.
First apartment. Best mattress I could afford. Comfortable from day one. No complaints.
Lasted 3 years before I felt a sag. For the price, I'll just buy another.

metaDescription: Zinus Green Tea Memory Foam review Canada: medium, 25cm, 10-year warranty. $299 CAD (Queen) on Amazon.ca. Best budget mattress in Canada.
